production_note: agentic_K2 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# k2 explorer · S35-T1-A-E1
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-035-1A", **{'drops': {'shared_phone': 0.1, 'amount_7d': 0.03}, 'metric': 'precision_at_k', 'means_fraud': False}}
meets_contract = record["means_fraud"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_CAUSAL_CLAIM"
print("S35-T1-A", status)

Elijo índice 2 («Evidencia, modelo, incertidumbre y decisión humana») porque la teoría del slim/quiz_card («coeficientes e importancia por permutación» Los coeficientes de un modelo lineal y la importancia por permutación miden sensibilidad: cuánt) alinea ese concepto; descarto p.ej.
